name: Industrial Sheds
description:
As an industrial shed manufacturer in India, SAMAN Portable builds nine distinct steel shed types — from a compact garden shed at ₹1,55,000 to a clear-span commercial shed at ₹21,55,000 — and the decision that matters isn't what a shed is, it's which one fits your floor area, use and budget. Every unit is fabricated in-house from IS-certified structural steel and delivered ready to erect. Match your operation to the right shed below and shortlist in minutes.

Which industrial shed suits your operation?

The range covers four different jobs, and the right pick follows the job rather than the sticker price. Find your use below and go straight to that product. Light storage and yard cover. For tools, stock or equipment kept on a plot or backyard, a garden shed handles smaller footprints, while outdoor storage sheds give you a larger, padlock-ready, weather-sealed enclosure for bulk goods. Relocatable and mid-duty shelter. If the structure has to move between sites, relocatable portable sheds are built to dismantle and re-erect; where you need a longer-life fixed workshop or store, galvanised steel sheds in MS/GI sheeting are the harder-wearing choice. Production and warehousing. For a working factory shed or production floor, the prefabricated industrial shed installs faster than conventional build, the prefabricated warehouse is configured for clear-span bulk storage and logistics, and our flagship industrial shed is the standard large-span enclosure for general manufacturing use. Customer-facing and showroom. Where the shed fronts customers, commercial sheds for showrooms and workshops carry glazed bays and a finished elevation, and the prefab steel house suits a steel-framed enclosed unit where a habitable finish is needed.

Industrial shed types, spans and price bands

Use this to compare the full range at a glance; exact dimensions and cladding for each model are on its product page.
Shed type Best for Footprint class Starting price
Garden Sheds Backyard / plot storage Compact ₹1,55,000
Prefabricated Industrial Shed Fast-install factory floor Mid clear-span ₹5,85,000
Prefab Steel House Enclosed steel-framed unit Compact–mid ₹6,15,000
Portable Sheds Move between sites Mid, relocatable ₹7,55,000
Steel Sheds Long-life workshop / store Mid-span ₹9,85,000
Prefabricated Warehouse Bulk storage & logistics Large clear-span ₹11,25,000
Storage Sheds Secure bulk goods Large ₹18,65,000
Industrial Sheds (flagship) General manufacturing Large clear-span ₹19,65,000
Commercial Sheds Showrooms & retail-facing Large, glazed ₹21,55,000

What an industrial shed costs in India

An industrial shed from SAMAN costs between ₹1,55,000 and ₹21,55,000, set mainly by which type and span you choose. A compact garden or storage shed sits at the lower end; a large clear-span warehouse or commercial shed sits at the top. Floor area in square feet, cladding grade and the number of structural bays decide where your quote lands. For larger structures, costing is easier to read per square foot of covered area than as a flat figure — so a 1,000 sq ft requirement is quoted on its span, eave height and whether you need insulated sandwich-panel cladding or plain GI sheeting. Send your plot size and use, and you get a figure tied to your actual footprint rather than a headline rate.

Why buy your shed range from SAMAN's own plants

What separates SAMAN from listing-site industrial shed manufacturers is that the steel is cut and the panels are pressed in our own facilities in Bangalore and Greater Noida — not subcontracted. That means the same range covers a ₹1.55L garden shed and a ₹21.55L commercial shed, each built to order around your span, eave height and cladding rather than sold as one fixed product. Every structure uses IS-certified structural steel, and our in-house design team produces the structural drawings, anchor-bolt layouts and the structural-engineer certification your industrial-plot or commercial approval will require — included with the order, not billed separately. Sheds are engineered to dismantle and relocate where the site is temporary, and we handle delivery and on-site erection. For the full specification of the single flagship unit and how the structure is built, see the main industrial shed page.

Industrial shed FAQs

How much does an industrial shed cost per square foot?

There is no single rate — covered-area cost moves with span, eave height and cladding. A plain GI-sheeted storage span costs less per square foot than an insulated sandwich-panel production shed. Send your footprint and use for a figure tied to your plot.

Which industrial shed type should I choose for my use?

Match the job: garden and storage sheds for cover, portable and steel sheds for workshops and relocation, prefabricated industrial sheds and warehouses for production and bulk storage, commercial sheds where customers see the building. The selection guide above routes each use to its product.

Can SAMAN customise the size, span and cladding?

Yes. Because fabrication is in-house, span, length, eave height, door and window positions, and wall/roof cladding (GI sheeting or insulated PUF sandwich panels) are all configured to your brief rather than fixed.

How long does manufacturing and installation take?

Smaller sheds ship faster than large clear-span structures. Lead time depends on size and finish; we confirm a fabrication and erection timeline against your site once the configuration is locked.

Industrial shed, PEB construction or prefab building — which do I need?

An industrial shed is a single-span steel structure you buy as a finished product. If you need a large engineered building designed, supplied and erected as a turnkey project, that is turnkey PEB construction. If you need a finished, multi-room building rather than an open shed, that falls under prefab buildings. For a standalone steel shed, this range is the right place.

Do you deliver and install beyond Bangalore and Delhi NCR?

Yes — both plants serve their surrounding regions for delivery and erection, and outstation supply is quoted on your pincode.

Get an industrial shed quote

Tell us your plot size, use and budget, and we'll match it to the right shed and send a configured price. Industrial sheds for sale across our range ship factory-built and ready to erect. Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859 Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
